Fuhu жњґиѓЎ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Fuhu (жњґиѓЎ). Chieftain who shielded Zhang Lu, latter surrendered to Wei. Defeated by Huang Quan. Fuhu was affiliated with Banshun and the Wei Kingdom.
